name: @code-charter/drift
description: Drift infrastructure substrate: the Stop-hook reconciliation chain (sub-agent + drift-sync skill) and the .claude installer

scripts.test: jest --testPathIgnorePatterns='src/reconcile/(reconcile_code|reconcile_delta|reconcile_membership|reconcile_stitch|reconcile_stitch_eval|ariadne_adapter)\.test\.ts' && jest src/reconcile/reconcile_code.test.ts && jest src/reconcile/reconcile_delta.test.ts && jest src/reconcile/reconcile_membership.test.ts && jest src/reconcile/reconcile_stitch.test.ts && jest src/reconcile/reconcile_stitch_eval.test.ts && jest src/reconcile/ariadne_adapter.test.ts
